schema_nota: Coluna 'step' nao existe na tabela. Proxy correto para 'completou etapa 2' = score >= 50 (services/waitlist.ts:updateLeadStep2 seta score=50 ao salvar segment+size+revenue_band+pain). Queries abaixo ja usam esse proxy.
causa_raiz_bloqueio: Ambiente sandbox isolado: .env.local nao e commitado (correto por seguranca). Credenciais NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL e SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY nao estao disponiveis no container de execucao do agente. O Supabase MCP nas sessoes anteriores era provido por configuracao externa ao .mcp.json do projeto (token OAuth Anthropic com acesso ao projeto Supabase). Nao e um bug no .mcp.json.
acao_recomendada: CEO executar queries abaixo manualmente no Supabase Dashboard > SQL Editor para obter os dados. Ou: re-habilitar Supabase MCP via SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN na configuracao do agente.

queries_para_execucao_manual.instrucao: Rodar no Supabase Dashboard -> SQL Editor do projeto hayzer.com.br
queries_para_execucao_manual.q1_leads_24h_por_utm: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score >= 50) AS completed_step_2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC;
queries_para_execucao_manual.q2_total_acumulado: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_all_time FROM waitlist_leads;
queries_para_execucao_manual.q3_ultimos_7d: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS dia, COUNT(*) AS leads_dia, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score >= 50) AS completaram_step2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY dia DESC;
queries_para_execucao_manual.q4_tempo_medio_step1_step2: SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at))/60)::INT AS avg_minutes FROM waitlist_leads WHERE score >= 50 AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
queries_para_execucao_manual.q5_top3_utms: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) AS total FROM waitlist_leads WHERE utm_source IS NOT NULL GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
queries_para_execucao_manual.q6_crescimento_7d: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS leads_ultimos_7d, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS leads_7d_anteriores FROM waitlist_leads;
